name: California Hazardous Waste (Title 22, non-RCRA)
what_it_does: California-only hazardous wastes broader than federal RCRA (STLC/TTLC criteria).
jurisdiction: DTSC; administered by the local CUPA

hypotheses.question: Is the waste a California-only (non-RCRA) hazardous waste?
hypotheses.claim_to_test: A waste may be California hazardous under 22 CCR 66261.24 (STLC/TTLC) even if not federally hazardous.
